Prolific but overgrown pear tree. 

At SE corner of parking lot for Round Lake Area Park District Teen Center. Enter from Orchard Lane if driving. No fences.

Large, sweet, green apples. They are up rather high so you may need fruit picker! Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: August-September.
Small tree with nice McIntosh-type apples. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: September-September.

Stand-alone apple tree on outlot in front of a Dialysis Center. No fences, easy parking/access. Believe tree to be in the "right-of-way" for Rt. 59.
